class.name: CanvasItemGizmo
class.brief_description: Abstract class to expose editor gizmos for [CanvasItem].
class.description: This abstract class helps connect the [CanvasItem] scene with the editor-specific [EditorCanvasItemGizmo] class. [CanvasItemGizmo] by itself has no exposed API, refer to [method CanvasItem.add_gizmo] and pass it an [EditorCanvasItemGizmo] instance.
